sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁדד

Transliteration: shâdad

Phonetic: shaw-dad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to deal violently with, despoil, devastate, ruin, destroy, spoil
    1. (Qal)
      1. to violently destroy, devastate, despoil, assail
      2. devastator, despoiler (participle) (substantive)
    2. (Niphal) to be utterly ruined
    3. (Piel)
      1. to assault
      2. to devastate
    4. (Pual) to be devastated
    5. (Poel) to violently destroy
    6. (Hophal) to be devastated

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2331

Part(s) of speech: Verb
